Focus Mode

Focus Mode Settings

Choose how strong the blocker should be, whether to use Hard Lock, and when blocking runs automatically.

How Strong Should Blocking Be?

Choose One

Pick what should happen when Facebook tries to show Reels.

Quick Pause Time

Pause Button

This sets how long the Pause button keeps blocking turned off.

Pick any value from 5 to 180 minutes.

Smart Exceptions

Allow List

Allow Reels on specific pages or profiles by adding one rule per line.

Rules can be full URLs, host/path patterns (facebook.com/page), or path prefixes (/your-profile).

Friction Controls

Confirmations

Add confirmation prompts before actions that can reduce blocking.

Hard Lock

Anti-Bypass

Hard Lock removes quick pause and can delay turning blocking off.

Set to 0 for instant off. Any higher value adds a countdown before blocking turns off.

Schedule

Auto On/Off

Automatically run blocking during selected days and hours.

For overnight schedules, choose the day when the schedule starts.
